description: Configure the store's transactional email infrastructure. Update the Store Email Addresses for Sales Representative (Name: 'NestWell Sales', Email: 'sales@nestwell.local') and Customer Support (Name: 'NestWell Help Team', Email: 'support@nestwell.local'). Configure Sales Emails so the New Order Confirmation Email Sender is 'Customer Support', 'manager@nestwell.local' is added to 'Send Order Email Copy To', and the Invoice Email Sender is 'Sales Representative'. Additionally, update Contacts settings to send emails to 'support@nestwell.local' using the 'Customer Support' email sender. Save all changes. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
